title: agent cli
subtitle: terminal-first multi-agent cockpit — real Claude TUI front and center, thin file rail, tabs = projects
loop: Tab = project. Panes = agents, each in its own worktree. Real TUI everywhere. Ship config before code — build the Tauri app only against frictions the trials prove.

cards.title: Editor-fidelity spike
cards.summary: 1-2h, not a week: open a real file in helix at real terminal font next to the VSCode screenshot. Tools installed (zellij/yazi/helix via brew, Ghostty already present); spike/ has the file and instructions. Resolves the riskiest unknown before either trial starts — added after the blind-spot audit found this was riding undecided inside a 7-day trial.
cards.done: Verdict logged in DECISIONS.md: does a TUI editor satisfy 'I expected it to look like VSCode's,' per the threshold already written there.

cards.title: Zellij cockpit trial
cards.summary: KDL layout in Ghostty: tabs per project (indx, brutal, prova, gripe), yazi file rail, claude/codex panes each in their own worktree. Zellij persistence — no tmux wrapper. Runs only after R0 passes.
cards.done: One week of daily use across 2+ projects with 3+ agent panes; every friction logged in ERRORS.md same-day, not from memory.

cards.title: Superconductor daily-driver trial
cards.summary: Already installed (super.engineering). Its workspace-tabs + worktree-per-task model is exactly the ask; its chat UI instead of the claude TUI is the open question. Closed source, v0.1.0 nightly. Runs after R1 concludes, not concurrently — parallel trials would confound friction attribution with tool-switching cost.
cards.done: Clear keep/kill verdict after a full real week: does losing the terminal CLI view actually hurt?

cards.title: Ship v0 cockpit config
cards.summary: Winner of the trials becomes the shipped artifact: zellij KDL layout(s) + install script + README in this repo. Zero application code.
cards.done: Fresh shell: one command → cockpit with 4 project tabs, agents running, surviving a restart.

cards.title: Worktree helper
cards.summary: One keystroke: new agent pane = git worktree add + claude launched inside it, named and disposable. The 'same repo, parallel tasks' half of the mixed workflow.
cards.done: From any project tab: new-worktree-agent in <5s; cleanup command removes worktree + branch.

cards.title: Zed stripped fallback config
cards.summary: Verified settings.json/keymap/tasks for Zed as window-per-project cockpit (no project tabs exist in Zed — top community request). Kept as documented fallback, not the main path.
cards.done: Config documented in docs/; applied in <1h if ever wanted.

cards.title: Tauri 2 native harness
cards.summary: The endgame, only if trials hit the named threshold in DECISIONS.md (2026-07-07 entry) — not a vibe call after the fact. Seed from hashmark's Tauri scaffold + Warp design spec (color algebra, fonts, 358 icons); new core = portable-pty → xterm.js; workspace tabs + worktree-per-task model stolen from Superconductor.
cards.done: v0 scope written from the trials' logged frictions — not imagined features — before any code.
cards.closes: closes the gap no OSS app fills (native-light, real PTY, thin rail)

cards.title: Mine Superconductor bundle for UX patterns
cards.summary: Settings-key notes + screenshot (kept in resources/ — the actual binary was removed from git, see DECISIONS.md 2026-07-07: you can't mine UX patterns from a compiled binary, so committing it had no benefit). Only runs if R3 actually fires, not scheduled by default — was previously a guaranteed step regardless of trial outcome.

shipped.title: Research: OSS landscape + Zed verification
shipped.summary: July 2026 survey: every purpose-built Claude Code GUI reimplements the UI, is deprecated, closed, or Electron-heavy. Zed: no project tabs, terminals die on quit, git panel single-repo. Zellij+yazi delivers ~90% of the spec at zero build cost.
shipped.done: Findings drove the trial-first roadmap; rejected options documented with reasons.

shipped.title: Repo + roadmap board + interactive cockpit demo
shipped.summary: Private repo with rockmap vendored, this board, and an interactive HTML demo of the zellij cockpit experience. Note: the demo shipped before any real trial hours were logged — flagged in the 2026-07-07 blind-spot audit as the project's central risk; see ERRORS.md.

shipped.title: Audit remediation
shipped.summary: Scaffolded PRD/ROADMAP/DECISIONS/PARKED/ERRORS. Installed zellij, yazi, helix (Ghostty already present) and built the editor-fidelity spike (spike/). Sequenced R1/R2, named the R3 threshold, re-gated S2. Removed the 117MB Superconductor binary from git (kept 548K of notes/icon). Pruned an orphaned worktree in indx; flagged its branch ambiguity for Jason instead of guessing.
shipped.done: All 16 audit findings addressed or explicitly deferred with a named owner (Jason, for the one judgment call).
